response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:23: Identified first vocal performance 'Deep Fake' (ディープフェイク) via on-screen text. Lyrics transcribed from video as search returned no results. 2. 01:23-03:43: Identified talking segment. 3. 03:43-04:59: Identified second vocal performance 'Umi Unya Happy Life' (うみうにゃはっぴーらいふ) via on-screen text, with credits to Umi Mizumi (水宮). Lyrics transcribed from video.
response.global_summary: The video is a birthday live performance by the VTuber Umi Mizumi (水宮), featuring a performance of two songs: 'Deep Fake' and 'Umi Unya Happy Life'. The video includes a short talking segment between the two songs. Both songs are presented as original creations by the performer.

scenes.description: The VTuber Umi Mizumi performs her song 'Deep Fake', dancing on a stage with backup dancers. The song title 'ディープフェイク' appears in the background graphics.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everyone is pretending all the time
Who is the real face for?
It's getting more and more painful, isn't it?
Following the pattern of matching sweetness
I just want to smile without crying
O wise of me
Always Free free free
I don't understand love at all
O wise of me
Someday I want to take off this Deep fake
If it's not even acting
Until then, just
Drafting the sky
Keeping a Deep fake hidden in my heart

scenes.description: The VTuber transitions to talking, discussing her birthday event and upcoming projects, including the release of her new original song.
The VTuber performs her original song 'Umi Unya Happy Life', with the title and composer credits '水宮' displayed on screen.
